title: Media - Martin McCluskey
meta_description: Labour MP for Inverclyde and Renfrewshire West
headings: h2: "This is a big moment in our work to cut energy bills."
h2: ‘The Finance Secretary’s speech did not mention Inverclyde.’
h2: "This is what ending austerity in the UK looks like."
h2: 'We need to do everything we can to stay safe and healthy.'
text_excerpt: Media - Martin McCluskey Skip to main content Martin McCluskey Labour MP for Inverclyde and Renfrewshire West Join Get Involved Donate Media Newsletter Sign Up Visit Parliament How I Can Help Contact Privacy Policy More Menu Media Image: PA "This is a big moment in our work to cut energy bills." 24 January 2026 | This week, the UK Labour Government launched the Warm Homes Plan, the most ambitious programme of home energy upgrades this country has ever seen. In my role as Minister for Energy Consumers, this is a big moment in our continuing work towards cutting energy bills. Red more Image: George Munro (left), Jane Barlow/PA Wire (right) ‘The Finance Secretary’s speech did not mention Inverclyde.’ 17 January 2026 | For 19 years, SNP budgets have consistently shortchanged our area. And this week’s Scottish budget was no exception. Read more (Image: George Munro) "This is what ending austerity in the UK looks like." 10 January 2026 | For years, people across Inverclyde and Renfrewshire West have felt the consequences of Conservative UK and SNP Scottish Governments that have asked communities to do more with less. Read more Image: Liam McBurney/PA Wire 'We need to do everything we can to stay safe and healthy.' 14 December 2025 | Over the past week, worrying news about increases in a new flu strain have dominated the headlines. Cases have more than doubled in a week and we need to do everything we can to stay safe and healthy this winter.
